name: artisana-root
description: Root package.json to manage the Artisana ecosystem

scripts.build: npm install --prefix ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend && (cd ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend && npm run build) && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const possiblePaths=['ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend/.next', 'ArtISANA/ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend/.next', 'frontend/.next', '.next']; let foundSrc=null; for(const p of possiblePaths) { if(fs.existsSync(p)) { foundSrc=p; break; } } const dest='.next'; try { if(foundSrc) { console.log('Found source .next at: ' + foundSrc); if(fs.existsSync(dest) && path.resolve(foundSrc) !== path.resolve(dest)) fs.rmSync(dest, {recursive:true, force:true}); if(path.resolve(foundSrc) !== path.resolve(dest)) { fs.cpSync(foundSrc, dest, {recursive:true}); console.log('Successfully synced .next to root'); } else { console.log('.next is already in root, skipping sync'); } } else { console.error('Could not find .next in any of: ' + possiblePaths.join(', ')); process.exit(1); } } catch(e) { console.error(e.message); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend && cd ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
